Senior Backend Engineer

Acme GmbH is hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to join our platform team in Berlin.

You will design and operate Python services, own our FastAPI APIs, and improve our PostgreSQL data model. We work remote-first across the EU.

  • Build and maintain backend services in Python
  • Design REST APIs with FastAPI
  • Collaborate with frontend and product teams

Requirements: 5+ years with Python, strong SQL, fluent English, German is a plus.

Acme GmbH | Imprint | FOOTER_NOISE
